I

InHouse - Class in myatt.Model
This class inherits the Part class and describes the InHouse parts.
InHouse(int, String, double, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class myatt.Model.InHouse
This constructor creates a new InHouse part with the given id, name, price, stock, min, max, and machine ID.
inHouseRadioButton - Variable in class myatt.Controller.AddPartController
 
initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class myatt.Controller.AddPartController
This method initializes the controller class.

This method initializes the controller class.
initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class myatt.Controller.MainScreenController
This method initializes the controller class.
initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class myatt.Controller.ModifyPartController
 
initialize(URL, ResourceBundle) - Method in class myatt.Controller.ModifyProductController
This method initializes the controller class.
Inventory - Class in myatt.Model
This class is the inventory it stores the parts and products.
